# Issue Template — Feature

```markdown
## User Story
As a <persona>, I want to <do>, so that <value>.

## Spec Reference
- docs/product/feature-specs/<feature>.md §<anchor>

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

## UX / UI Links
- Figma / storyboard: <link>
- DESIGN.md sections: <list>

## Out of Scope
- ...

## Telemetry / Metrics
- ...

## Reviewers
- bug-hunter, behavior-reviewer, architecture-reviewer, ui-reviewer (as applicable)

## Estimate
small | medium | large

## Owner
@<owner>
```
